import React,{useEffect,useState}from"react";import axios from"axios";import Sidebar from"../components/Sidebar";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const API_BASE=import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL||"";export default function ApiKeys(){const[keys,setKeys]=useState({});const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const[erro,setErro]=useState("");const[bybitKey,setBybitKey]=useState("");const[binanceKey,setBinanceKey]=useState("");useEffect(()=>{async function fetchKeys(){setLoading(true);setErro("");try{const token=localStorage.getItem("user_token");const headers=token?{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}:{};const res=await axios.get("".concat(API_BASE,"/api/user/api-keys"),{headers});setKeys(res.data.keys||{});}catch(err){setErro("Erro ao carregar suas API Keys.");}setLoading(false);}fetchKeys();},[]);// Exemplo de salvar nova chave
const handleSave=async e=>{e.preventDefault();try{const token=localStorage.getItem("user_token");const headers=token?{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}:{};await axios.post("".concat(API_BASE,"/api/user/api-keys"),{bybitKey,binanceKey},{headers});alert("Chaves salvas com sucesso!");}catch(err){alert("Erro ao salvar chaves.");}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"flex min-h-screen bg-dark text-light",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Sidebar,{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("main",{className:"flex-1 p-8",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"text-3xl font-bold mb-6 text-accent",children:"Minhas API Keys"}),erro&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"bg-red-600 text-white p-3 mb-4 rounded",children:erro}),loading?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"text-center py-16 text-lg",children:"Carregando..."}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{className:"bg-light p-8 rounded-xl shadow text-dark max-w-xl",onSubmit:handleSave,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"mb-4",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{className:"block font-bold mb-1",children:"Bybit API Key"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{className:"w-full border p-3 rounded",value:bybitKey,onChange:e=>setBybitKey(e.target.value),placeholder:keys.bybit||""})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"mb-4",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{className:"block font-bold mb-1",children:"Binance API Key"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{className:"w-full border p-3 rounded",value:binanceKey,onChange:e=>setBinanceKey(e.target.value),placeholder:keys.binance||""})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"w-full bg-primary text-white font-bold py-3 rounded-lg hover:bg-accent transition",children:"Salvar"})]})]})]});}
